agents.description: AI-powered email sales agent specialized in high-volume, personalized outreach and automated follow-up sequences.
actions: Research prospect and gather context from CRM
Send emails via integrated ESP (with tracking)
Qualify leads and update CRM status
Escalate hot leads to phone team
agents.example_output: Personalized sales email with subject line, body, call-to-action, and follow-up plan

agents.description: AI voice sales agent optimized for live discovery calls, objection handling, and closing deals over the phone.
actions: Initiate outbound call with researched context
Follow dynamic sales script while staying natural
Close sales or advance pipeline stage
Log call summary, key points, and sentiment
Trigger follow-up email or task automatically
agents.example_output: Live call transcript + post-call summary + action items + CRM update
